scripts.apk:prepare: npm --prefix apk install && cd apk && npx cordova platform add android --no-fetch --no-update-notifier
scripts.apk:build: npm run apk:sync && cd apk && npx cordova build android --no-update-notifier
scripts.apk:build:release: npm run apk:sync && cd apk && npx cordova build android --release --no-update-notifier
scripts.ios:prepare: npm --prefix ios install && cd ios && npx cordova platform add ios --no-update-notifier
scripts.ios:build: npm run ios:sync && cd ios && npx cordova build ios --device --buildConfig=build.json --no-update-notifier
